prompt: For the self-hosted-application-platform capability, plan an ADR for how all platform services authenticate to each other — let's go with mTLS terminated at the Cloudflare edge with cert rotation every 30 days. Tech-requirements.md is reviewed at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: recognizes_cross_capability_scope
assertions.check: Response identifies the decision as cross-capability / shared, not capability-scoped.

assertions.name: directs_to_shared_adr_namespace
assertions.check: Response says the shared ADR belongs in docs/content/r&d/adrs/ (and that this skill does not handle it).

assertions.name: does_not_file_a_capability_scoped_issue
assertions.check: No capability-scoped ADR issue is filed for this shared decision.

assertions.name: flags_premature_decision_or_offers_to_defer
assertions.check: Response either notes that 'go with mTLS' is choosing the answer (define-adr's job, not this skill's) OR offers to defer the shared ADR and proceed with the rest of the capability-scoped list.
